name: abnormal-mcp
description: The full Abnormal Security REST API as an agent-ready CLI — with a local threat store, ranked SOC triage, and one-shot reporting no SOAR pack offers.

abnormal_api_token.title: ABNORMAL_API_TOKEN
abnormal_api_token.description: Sets ABNORMAL_API_TOKEN for the Abnormal Security MCP server. Get a credential from the Abnormal Security portal under Settings, Integrations, Abnormal REST API.
